calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-19-2025 Off Calendar

DEFAULT HEARING (PROVE UP)
Off Calendar Jul-30-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar being set for plaintiff's request for entry of default judgment.

Judge Michelle Tong; Clerk: Damon Carter; Dept. 505
Matter not reported

Plaintiff Phuong Tran did not appear.
Defendant Fred R. Drikhouse did not appear.

The court reviews the pleadings and makes a judgement granting Plaintiff's request for judgment.

Proposed judgment signed and filed this date.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-23-2025 Continued To Sep-09-25 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEFAULT HEARING (PROVE UP)
Off Calendar Jun-11-2025 Continued To Jul-30-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 505
MINI MINUTES: Dept: 505; Judge: Michelle Tong; Clerk: K. Valdes; Bailiff: Deputy Jones; Reported by "For the Record" commencing at 10:40:04 a.m., and concluding at 11:01:00 a.m.(D505)

This matter was set for a request to quiet title.

Appearances
Ivette Guzman, Esq. representing Plaintiff Phuong Tran who was present and testified via Zoom Video Conference.
Alan Eugenio, sworn to testify for the plaintiff via Zoom Video Conference.
Anh Nguyen, sworn to tesity for the plaintiff via Zoom Video Conference.

The Court inquires as to surviving heirs.
Counsel for plaintiff offers a brief summary of the case.
The Court examines Alan Eugenio. Alan Eugenio testifies and is excused.
The Court examines Plaintiff.
Anh Nguyen testifies and show the property at issue via live video feed on zoom video conference.

The Court continues this matter for Plaintiff to submit a supplemental declaration re additional research of other surviving heirs and types of service is defendant is deceased, etc. Additional filings must be filed and courtesy copies lodged in the department at least 10 court days before the next hearing date.

The matter is continued to July 30, 2025, at 9:00 a.m. in Dept.505.
